name: Hillary Clinton's Chocolate Chip Oatmeal Cook
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, salt and baking soda in a large bowl. Set aside.
2. With an electric mixer beat together the shortening, sugars and vanilla in a large bowl until creamy. Add eggs, beating until light and fluffy. Gradually beat in flour mixture and oats. Stir in chocolate chips.
3. Drop batter by well-rounded teaspoonfuls onto greased baking sheets and bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 8 to 10 minutes, or until golden. Let cool on sheets for 2 minutes before transfering to a wire rack to cool completely. Makes 7 1/2 dozen.
I must like a larger cookie because this only made 4 1/2 dozen from me.
They took 14 minutes to bake.
